description: Model pricing and environmental impact intensity factors for orchestration cost estimation

gpt-5.5.notes: Recommended high-capability reasoning/coding model. Standard short-context rate.

gpt-5.4.notes: Balanced current frontier model. Standard short-context rate.

gpt-5.4-mini.notes: Lower-cost current model for lightweight orchestration work.

gpt-5.4-nano.notes: Lowest-cost current OpenAI model for classification, routing, and simple transforms.

gpt-5.3-codex.notes: Specialized coding model. Standard Codex rate.

claude-opus-4-8.notes: Most capable Claude model for complex reasoning and long-horizon agentic coding.

claude-sonnet-4-6.notes: Claude balance point for speed and intelligence.

claude-haiku-4-5.notes: Fastest current Claude model with near-frontier intelligence.

gpt-4o-mini.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; do not route new agents here.

gpt-4o.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; replaced by gpt-5.4 or gpt-5.5 depending task complexity.

gpt-4.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; avoid for new routing.

gpt-4-turbo.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; avoid for new routing.

gpt-3.5-turbo.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; avoid for new routing.

claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; replaced by claude-sonnet-4-6.

claude-3-opus-20240229.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; replaced by claude-opus-4-8.

claude-3-sonnet-20240229.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; avoid for new routing.

claude-3-haiku-20240307.notes: Retained for historical run-cost compatibility; replaced by claude-haiku-4-5.

notes.pricing: Prices in USD per million tokens. Current model pricing reviewed on 2026-05-31 from OpenAI and Anthropic API pricing pages.
notes.openai_pricing_scope: OpenAI prices use Standard short-context rates where applicable. Long-context, Batch, Flex, Priority, tool calls, hosted containers, and regional/data-residency uplifts are not included in the base fields.
notes.anthropic_pricing_scope: Anthropic prices use first-party Claude API base input/output rates. Prompt cache write rates, Batch discounts, fast mode, partner cloud regional premiums, and data-residency multipliers are not included in the base fields.
notes.energy: Energy intensity (kWh per million tokens) is an internal estimate for relative orchestration analytics, not a provider-published billing metric.
notes.water: Water usage (liters per million tokens) is an internal estimate for relative orchestration analytics. Actual values depend on datacenter location, cooling method, utilization, and energy mix.
notes.legacy_models: Legacy model entries are retained so historical run logs can still be priced; new agent routing should prefer current entries or aliases.
notes.disclaimer: Environmental impact estimates are approximations. Pricing changes frequently; refresh this file when preferred_models are changed or provider pricing changes.
